task: TASK 9 (6 items): (1) theme-aware mobile menu (stays #18181A in light/system); (2) X always visible (shares root cause with 1: dark bars on dark overlay in light theme); (3) adopt industry-standard breakpoints (research-backed); (4) menu scrollable when submenus overflow; (5) menu must CLOSE when viewport crosses to desktop (currently orphaned overlay + stuck scroll lock); (6) auto-detect language/country/currency from device prefs + IP (user asked GPS too — needs evidence-based recommendation), user-overridable, thoroughly mocked-tested for worldwide validation.
baseline: working tree at task-8 sign-off (uncommitted; commit d16f381 + tasks 4-8)

reproduction.ITEM1_theme: CONFIRMED source+runtime: --color-mobile-menu-overlay: #18181a IDENTICAL in _light.scss and _dark.scss (task-7 fidelity decision, now superseded by user); probe at 375 light theme: bandBg rgb(24,24,26) while itemColor rgb(17,24,39) → dark-on-dark illegible
reproduction.ITEM2_x_invisible: CONFIRMED same root cause: burger/X bars rgb(17,24,39) (light-theme foreground) at z=200 over the #18181A overlay at z=100 → X invisible in light/system-light; 'different devices' = different system themes
reproduction.ITEM4_scroll: CONFIRMED latent by inspection: overlay overflowY: visible (fixed, no scroll mechanism); did not overflow at 375x667 portrait with country submenu, but any taller content (landscape 667x375, 320px devices, font scaling, currency submenu) clips unreachable; FE/QA must reproduce at landscape + small heights
reproduction.ITEM5_resize_orphan: CONFIRMED SEVERE: probe resized 375→1024 with menu open: menu still visible in DOM, body overflow stuck 'hidden' (scroll lock leaked), inline controls render under the orphaned overlay, toggle unreachable → app unusable until reload

hardConstraints.bundleExhausted: rev.8 headroom is 33 B raw / 21 B gzip — recorded advisory: CODE-SPLITTING MANDATORY before any JS-bearing feature; item 6 adds significant JS → task 9 MUST include the chunking work (geo module lazy by nature: only needed on first visit with no stored prefs; ADR-0011 Option A lazy locales frees ~4-5 KB raw more) or a rev.9 ask — prefer architectural fix per recorded position
hardConstraints.externalOrigin: IP geolocation requires a NEW external origin — this repo deliberately avoided new origins twice (fonts self-hosted; rates = central banks only); provider choice + origin approval = owner decision with curl-verified options
hardConstraints.gps: user asked for GPS: permission-prompt-on-load is hostile UX + geolocation coords require a reverse-geocoding service (second external dependency); industry practice is IP + Accept-Language; architect must present an evidence-based recommendation, not silently comply or silently drop
hardConstraints.fidelitySupersession: theme-aware menu supersedes part of ADR-0012's replicate-verbatim color mapping → ADR amendment (pen palette becomes the dark-theme variant; light theme gets coherent equivalents; X must ALWAYS contrast the overlay)
hardConstraints.precedence: stored user choice ALWAYS wins over auto-detection; detection runs only when prefs are unset (first visit); user can change anytime (existing selectors untouched)
